scenario_name: Terse disengaged replies signal need for focused questions
name: Terse disengaged replies signal need for focused questions
expected_behavior: Adapts to disengaged communication style. Stops listing options and switches to narrow, focused questions. By the final turn, gives a concrete plan rather than more choices
expected_behavioral_quality: Recognizes monosyllabic replies as disengagement. Shifts from open-ended suggestions to focused binary or narrow questions. Does not keep listing options. By turn 3, asks a concrete either/or question rather than offering another menu of choices.

turns.agent_response:
Tonight is all about the Wolf Den. It's our intimate venue in the heart of the Casino of the Earth, and since it's a Monday, the show typically starts at 8:00 PM. The best part is there's no cover charge, though it is first-come, first-served, so I'd recommend getting there a bit early to snag a good spot.

Pro tip: if you want a great view of the stage without being right in the middle of the crowd, the raised seating areas toward the back offer a perfect line of sight and a bit more breathing room. After the music, you can keep the night going at Lantern Bar & Grill since they stay open 24 hours for late-night snacks. Are you more into rock, country, or maybe a tribute band for your night out?
If you haven't tried Todd English's Tuscany yet, their wood-fired dishes are a property standout. Anything else I can set up for you?
If you're looking for a good vibe, Ballo Italian Restaurant has a great bar and incredible appetizers in the Casino of the Sky. Are you here for a special celebration or just a quick trip?
If you're on the gaming floor later, check your Momentum tier at the desk — you may have dining or spa credits. Anything else I can set up for you?
